pages.text: The second stage: $(l)resonance sockets$(). Up to $(l)4 sockets$() per gear, each inlaid with one of 6 themed crystals. $(l)E must be complete first.$()

pages.title: How it works
pages.text: 1. $(l)Right-click$() with crucible-forged gear → loaded.$(br)2. $(l)Right-click$() with each $(l)Resonance Crystal$() → $(l)1 socket immediately written$() (no ignite step).$(br)3. $(l)Right-click empty-handed$() → take gear back.$(br)4. Sockets are $(l)append-only$() — no removal, no replacement.

pages.title: 6 Themes
pages.text: $(c)Sharpness$() — +5% damage / socket$(br)$(e)Swiftness$() — -4% cooldown / socket (placeholder)$(br)$(4)Leech$() — +2% lifesteal / socket$(br)$(b)Ward$() — +3% damage reduction / socket$(br)$(9)Focus$() — -4% mana cost / socket (placeholder)$(br)$(d)Spark$() — +2% crit chance / socket$(br2)Same theme may be inlaid multiple times — effects stack.

pages.title: Tactical Choices
pages.text: With 4 sockets, you choose your build:$(br)· $(l)4× Sharpness$() = +20% damage (pure offense)$(br)· $(l)4× Ward$() = +12% damage reduction (pure defense)$(br)· $(l)Mixed$() = balanced (e.g. 2× Sharpness + 2× Spark = +10% damage + 4% crit)$(br2)$(o)Choose by playstyle. Mixed sockets reward versatility; pure stacks reward specialization.$()
